name: Chicken and Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken and pat it dry with absorbent paper.
2. Heat the fat in a skillet over medium heat. Add onion and garlic; cook until the onion is tender. Remove with a slotted spoon and set aside.
3. Put the chicken pieces, skin side down, in the skillet. Turn to brown the pieces on all sides.
4. When the chicken is browned, add tomato, onion, water, rice, parsley, and the dry seasonings. Cover and cook over low heat about 45 minutes, or until the thickest pieces of chicken are tender when pierced with a fork.
